options.text: 2 Buoyant rescue quoits, attached to not less than 30mtrs buoyant line
2 buoyant rescue quoits attached to not less than 15mtrs buoyant line
1 Buoyant rescue quoits, attached to not less than 30mtrs buoyant line
1 buoyant rescue quoits attached to not less than 15mtrs buoyant line

explanation: SOLAS Chapter III, LSA Code requires each lifeboat to be equipped with two buoyant rescue quoits, each attached to a buoyant line of not less than 30 meters in length. These are essential for recovering persons from the water.
